Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class EmailTemplate

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.EmailTemplate
public class EmailTemplate extends SObject

Java class for EmailTemplate complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="EmailTemplate">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="ApiVersion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AttachedContentDocuments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Attachments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Body" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BrandTemplateId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CombinedAttachments" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ContentDocumentLinks" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DeveloperName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Encoding" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EnhancedLetterhead" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}EnhancedLetterhead" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EnhancedLetterheadId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Folder" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}Folder" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FolderId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FolderName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="HtmlValue" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsActive" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsBuilderContent" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastModifiedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="LastUsedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ListEmailTemplates" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}QueryResult" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Markup" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Name" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="NamespacePrefix" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Owner" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="OwnerId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="RelatedEntityType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Subject" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SystemModstamp" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TemplateStyle" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TemplateType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TimesUsed" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="UiType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
